failure_examples.text: I need to request access to the project files on the shared drive.
failure_examples.llm_reasoning: Contexto "access" domina; "project" e "files" são subordinados ao pedido de acesso.

failure_examples.text: The backup policy was changed by the admin without notice.
failure_examples.llm_reasoning: LLM reconhece que "policy" + "admin" = mudança de política, não backup de dados.

failure_examples.text: We need to buy a new laptop for the onboarding of the new employee.
failure_examples.llm_reasoning: LLM entende que o contexto principal é onboarding, não compra de hardware.

failure_examples.text: Can you reset the disk quota for my account on the storage server?
failure_examples.llm_reasoning: Múltiplos sinais de Storage (disk, quota, storage) vs. Access (reset, account) — LLM pondera intenção.
